'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=F8Ne8fxvlfFwCZzQKbuvp8PwXDY72o8EQ2rhV8MKuJA-1775993783-1.0.1.1-lP_rWvamNo98NHhRUNDF7ChaIz7JIPJ02lzj0vI1pDA"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
